apis.name: github
apis.title: GitHub
apis.description: Repos, issues, PRs, and workflow automation via the GitHub REST API

key_tools.name: list_repos
key_tools.description: List repositories for a user or organization

key_tools.name: get_file_contents
key_tools.description: Read a file or directory from a repository

key_tools.name: list_issues
key_tools.description: List issues in a repository with filters

key_tools.name: create_issue
key_tools.description: Open a new issue in a repository

key_tools.name: list_pull_requests
key_tools.description: List open and merged pull requests

key_tools.name: create_pull_request
key_tools.description: Open a pull request between branches

key_tools.name: search_code
key_tools.description: Search code across all GitHub repositories

key_tools.name: list_commits
key_tools.description: List commits with authors and messages

apis.name: atlassian
apis.title: Atlassian
apis.description: Jira issues, Confluence pages, and project management

key_tools.name: search_issues
key_tools.description: Search Jira issues using JQL queries

key_tools.name: get_issue
key_tools.description: Get full details of a Jira issue by key

key_tools.name: create_issue
key_tools.description: Create a new Jira issue or bug report

key_tools.name: update_issue
key_tools.description: Update issue fields like status, assignee, priority

key_tools.name: add_comment
key_tools.description: Add a comment to an issue

key_tools.name: transition_issue
key_tools.description: Move an issue through the workflow (e.g. In Progress → Done)

key_tools.name: list_projects
key_tools.description: List all Jira projects in the workspace

key_tools.name: get_project
key_tools.description: Get project details, board, and sprint info

apis.name: figma
apis.title: Figma
apis.description: Design files, components, prototypes, and comments

key_tools.name: get_file
key_tools.description: Get the full node tree and structure of a Figma file

key_tools.name: get_file_nodes
key_tools.description: Get specific nodes by ID from a Figma file

key_tools.name: get_image
key_tools.description: Export nodes as PNG, SVG, or PDF

key_tools.name: get_comments
key_tools.description: List all comments on a Figma file

key_tools.name: post_comment
key_tools.description: Add a comment to a file or specific node

key_tools.name: get_team_projects
key_tools.description: List all projects belonging to a team

key_tools.name: get_project_files
key_tools.description: List all Figma files in a project

key_tools.name: get_file_versions
key_tools.description: Get the version history of a file

apis.name: gmail
apis.title: Gmail
apis.description: Read, send, and manage Gmail messages and threads

key_tools.name: list_messages
key_tools.description: List Gmail messages with search filters

key_tools.name: get_message
key_tools.description: Get the full content of a specific message

key_tools.name: send_message
key_tools.description: Send an email via Gmail

key_tools.name: create_draft
key_tools.description: Create a draft email

key_tools.name: list_labels
key_tools.description: List all labels in the mailbox

key_tools.name: modify_message
key_tools.description: Add or remove labels from a message

key_tools.name: list_threads
key_tools.description: List email threads

key_tools.name: trash_message
key_tools.description: Move a message to trash

key_tools.name: list_customers
key_tools.description: List and search Stripe customers

key_tools.name: create_customer
key_tools.description: Create a new Stripe customer record

key_tools.name: create_payment_intent
key_tools.description: Create a payment intent for a charge

key_tools.name: list_subscriptions
key_tools.description: List active and cancelled subscriptions

key_tools.name: create_subscription
key_tools.description: Subscribe a customer to a price plan

key_tools.name: list_invoices
key_tools.description: List invoices for a customer or subscription

key_tools.name: create_refund
key_tools.description: Refund a charge fully or partially

key_tools.name: list_products
key_tools.description: List products and their pricing plans

apis.name: hubspot
apis.title: HubSpot
apis.description: CRM contacts and properties via the HubSpot Contacts API

key_tools.name: search_contacts
key_tools.description: Search CRM contacts by email, name, or custom properties

key_tools.name: create_contact
key_tools.description: Create a new CRM contact with properties

key_tools.name: update_contact
key_tools.description: Update contact properties like lifecycle stage or owner

key_tools.name: get_contact
key_tools.description: Get full details of a specific contact

key_tools.name: archive_contact
key_tools.description: Archive (soft-delete) a contact record

key_tools.name: merge_contacts
key_tools.description: Merge two duplicate contact records

key_tools.name: list_contacts
key_tools.description: List all contacts with pagination

key_tools.name: get_contact_properties
key_tools.description: Get available contact property definitions

apis.name: notion
apis.title: Notion
apis.description: Pages, databases, and workspace content in Notion

key_tools.name: search
key_tools.description: Search pages and databases across the workspace

key_tools.name: get_page
key_tools.description: Get a page and its properties

key_tools.name: create_page
key_tools.description: Create a new page inside a database or as a subpage

key_tools.name: update_page
key_tools.description: Update page properties (title, status, dates, etc.)

key_tools.name: query_database
key_tools.description: Query a database with filters and sorts

key_tools.name: create_database_item
key_tools.description: Add a new row/item to a Notion database

key_tools.name: append_block_children
key_tools.description: Append content blocks (text, bullets, code) to a page

key_tools.name: get_database
key_tools.description: Get a database schema including all property types

apis.name: slack
apis.title: Slack
apis.description: Channels, messages, users, and workspace management

key_tools.name: chat_post_message
key_tools.description: Send a message to a channel or DM

key_tools.name: conversations_history
key_tools.description: Get message history from a channel

key_tools.name: conversations_list
key_tools.description: List all public and private channels

key_tools.name: conversations_replies
key_tools.description: Get replies in a message thread

key_tools.name: users_list
key_tools.description: List all members of the Slack workspace

key_tools.name: search_messages
key_tools.description: Full-text search across all messages

key_tools.name: files_upload
key_tools.description: Upload a file and share it in a channel

key_tools.name: reactions_add
key_tools.description: Add an emoji reaction to a message

apis.name: shopify
apis.title: Shopify
apis.description: Products, orders, customers, and store management (requires your store subdomain)

key_tools.name: list_products
key_tools.description: List products with variants, pricing, and inventory

key_tools.name: get_product
key_tools.description: Get full product details including all variants

key_tools.name: list_orders
key_tools.description: List orders with status, customer, and line item filters

key_tools.name: get_order
key_tools.description: Get full order details including shipping and payment

key_tools.name: list_customers
key_tools.description: List customers with order history and tags

key_tools.name: update_order
key_tools.description: Update order notes, tags, or shipping address

key_tools.name: create_fulfillment
key_tools.description: Fulfill an order with tracking info

key_tools.name: list_inventory_levels
key_tools.description: Get stock levels across locations

apis.name: snowflake
apis.title: Snowflake
apis.description: Data warehouse queries, database operations, and analytics via the Snowflake SQL API

key_tools.name: execute_statement
key_tools.description: Execute a SQL statement and get results

key_tools.name: fetch_results
key_tools.description: Fetch paginated results from a running query

key_tools.name: cancel_statement
key_tools.description: Cancel a running query by statement handle

key_tools.name: list_databases
key_tools.description: List all accessible databases in the account

key_tools.name: list_schemas
key_tools.description: List all schemas within a database

key_tools.name: list_tables
key_tools.description: List tables and views in a schema

key_tools.name: describe_table
key_tools.description: Get column definitions and data types for a table

key_tools.name: list_warehouses
key_tools.description: List virtual warehouses and their current status
